prompt: Create a cinematic 16:9 digital illustration inspired by Las «Cuatro últimas canciones» by Strauss. Show an elderly male classical composer in formal dark suit and bow tie, positioned slightly left of center in side profile facing left toward a glowing sunset over a calm lake with distant mountains. His gray-white hair and the right half of his body dissolve into wind, mist, sparkling particles, and translucent fragments, suggesting a peaceful death or the soul dispersing into air. Add sweeping golden musical staves and floating notes across the upper right and lower right sky, integrated like luminous ribbons carried by the wind. Use a dreamy pastel palette of lavender, peach, gold, blue, and soft rose, with volumetric haze, painterly realism, epic orchestral atmosphere, and a serene melancholic mood. Include exactly 2 text elements: large bottom title text reading Las «Cuatro últimas canciones» in pale cream/yellow with dark outline and drop shadow, and a smaller bold red word at lower right reading Strauss with black outline. Place an opaque muted beige square over the man’s face, centered on the head, as if the face is intentionally censored. No extra text, no watermark, no borders.
